case_number: Criminal Revision Application is dismissed for non-prosecution

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Revision No. D – 16 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on MA No.664/2025 (Ex.A) 3. For hearing of main case 25.11.2025 None present for the applicant nor any intimation received. Same was the position on the last date of hearing viz. 18.11.2025; even on 14.10.2025, Counsel for the applicant sought time for preparation. Thereafter, nobody has turned up to proceed with the matter. Accordingly, the instant Criminal Revision Application is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
